theme_notes: Spain's Ferran Torres scored in the 105th minute to beat Argentina 1-0 in the 2026 World Cup final; Ukraine fired 400+ drones at Moscow in retaliation for Russian missile strikes on Kyiv; a federal judge froze the Paramount-Warner Bros merger; US strikes on Iran entered day nine as Strait of Hormuz tensions escalated.
settled: Zeroed out. Ferran Torres scored in the 105th minute. You settled in regulation.
Even. The Paramount-Warner merger is not. You're living the dream.
The Strait of Hormuz is contested. Your balance is not. Rub it in.
youOwe: Less than a commemorative Spain jersey. The shame is comparable.
Ukraine launched 400 drones this morning. You can't launch a single Venmo.
The Muppets headlined a World Cup halftime show. This debt also lacks dignity.
The Paramount-Warner merger is paused. So is your moral compass, apparently.
Not enough to fund a Ukrainian drone. Still enough to lose a friendship.
Messi played 120 minutes and left with nothing. You're doing similarly.
Ferran Torres came off the bench to score in the 105th. No excuses for you.
A federal judge blocked Paramount-Warner faster than you've moved on this.
Ukraine sent 400 drones to Moscow. They had follow-through. You don't.
Argentina played extra time with 10 men and still looked more committed.
The US has bombed Iran for nine straight days. Consistency you should learn.
Madonna performed at the World Cup halftime at 67. What's your excuse?
You are the Strait of Hormuz of this friendship. Everything reroutes around you.
Ukraine fired 400 drones and had a clearer objective than your payment timeline.
Twelve state AGs stopped the Paramount deal. Your partner has less legal leverage.
The Strait of Hormuz is one memo away from reopening. This needs more than a memo.
Nine days of bombing Iran and still no resolution. Your debt is the same.
Warner and Paramount couldn't merge their balance sheets. You can't clear yours.
theyOwe: They owe you less than the margin of Spain's World Cup win. One goal's worth.
Cute amount. Like The Muppets at halftime. Unexpected, minor, slightly offensive.
Smaller than what the US spends on Iran per hour. Still yours.
About what a Ukrainian drone costs. Less than their accountability.
Spain outlasted Argentina in extra time. Outlast this.
The Paramount-Warner deal needed a judge to move. Send a reminder instead.
Messi got nothing in the final. You're getting at least this. Collect.
The judge froze a billion-dollar deal. You just need one Venmo response.
Ferran Torres scored in the 105th minute. Your patience is also extra time.
Andy Burnham became PM overnight. Your money shouldn't take this long.
Argentina got knocked out in extra time. They didn't even owe anybody.
Nine days of US strikes on Iran. Yours has run longer and hit less.
Ukraine sent 400 drones to Moscow this morning. That's the right energy.
You are owed more than Argentina's dignity after the 105th minute. Take it.
The Paramount-Warner merger is frozen by order of a court. This one is yours.
The US has bombed Iran for nine days over a memo. You have more justification.
Ukraine launched 400 drones and the world took notice. Make them notice.
This debt is now a geopolitical situation. Escalate accordingly.
